benchmarks.title: Benchmarks
benchmarks.subtitle: Autumn is built on modern ASGI foundations, helping it stay highly competitive with the fastest Python frameworks available.

methodology.title: Methodology
methodology.body: Benchmarks were run on an AWS c5.large instance using `wrk` with 4 threads and 100 connections for 30 seconds. Each framework implemented a simple JSON response endpoint returning a static dictionary.
methodology.disclaimer: Benchmarks are indicative. Real-world performance depends heavily on your database, ORM, and business logic. Autumn prioritizes developer experience and maintainability while keeping performance overhead minimal.
